title: Experiment runner: harness, result logging, research_log.md
body:
## Description
Build experiment infrastructure:
- `pgolf/experiment.py` — Experiment runner that takes config overrides, runs training, logs results
- `docs/research_log.md` — Template for recording hypotheses, results, learnings
- Config snapshot saving to `docs/experiment_results/`
- Structured result output for comparison

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Can run experiments with config overrides from CLI
- [ ] Results automatically logged to research_log.md
- [ ] Config snapshots saved per experiment
- [ ] Tests for experiment runner
